templates.name: netbird-server
templates.title: NetBird (Server)
templates.description: Full NetBird control plane: combined netbird-server (management + signal + relay + STUN + embedded Dex IdP), dashboard, Postgres, NetBird reverse-proxy, CrowdSec, and Caddy.

templates.name: netbird-client
templates.title: NetBird (Client)
templates.description: Join a host to your NetBird network.
templates.note: Required .env: NB_SETUP_KEY (create one in the dashboard under Settings > Setup Keys). Optional: NB_MANAGEMENT_URL (default https://api.netbird.io — set to your self-hosted server)
